headline: Snap-on Acquires Diesel Laptops
summary: KENOSHA, Wis., June 09, 2026--Snap-on Incorporated today announced that it acquired Diesel Laptops, LLC ("Diesel Laptops") for approximately $100 million in cash on June 8, 2026.
